Document:
# Core Rule 3 - No ERP
Erotic roleplay (ERP) is strictly forbidden. If you're caught ERPing, this will result in a permanent ban. Joking around with occasional crude humor is fine, just know where to draw the line. If your behavior starts making others uncomfortable, it becomes a serious problem. Actions between one another should not go past kissing or handholding, these actions should also be done way outside of public areas where others can't see or hear you. This means no cuddling, no sitting on each others laps, no lying in bed toghether, etc. You should not be making sexual comments that are not used in an insulting manner or as a joke. Keep it PG.
